title: JSON Schema for the configuration options for the Corvus Markdown Language Provider.
description:
This is a map of schema location IRIs to the documentation targeting particular properties within that schema.
It allows you to manage documentation external to the schema itself.

Documentation.title: A map of the path within the schema to the documentation targeted at that path.

propertyNames.title: The path within the schema at which the documentation is targeted.

unevaluatedProperties.title: The documentation targeted at that path.

Details.title: The details of the documentation targeted at a particular path within the schema.
